plan_path.description: PlanPath is the current active or archived plan path when work is in flight.

last_landed_plan_path.description: LastLandedPlanPath is the most recent landed plan path when the worktree is otherwise idle.

last_landed_at.description: LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan.

CurrentPlanFile.description: CurrentPlanFile is the worktree-level pointer file under `.local/harness/current-plan.json`.
